name: @pryzm/plugin-window
description: PRYZM 2 — Window plugin (S11). Headless half: Store<WindowData>, typed errors, 5 handlers (CreateWindow / DeleteWindow / MoveWindow / SetWindowType / SetWindowSize). Cross-store mutation via wall.createOpening + window.create choreography. Producer (packages/geometry-kernel/src/producers/window.ts) emits a BufferGeometryDescriptor with frame + mullion + glass slots.
